Service identification: Service Dedicated Virtualization Environment Management Unique ID PRD.0.L.116 Service Model Infrastructure management This service is dependant of other layers which are indicated in the ‘Obligatory’ chapter of this document and which have their own Service Description. The combination of the layers assures the customer of the full stack management.
Infrastructure management: This Service is the management and administration of the dedicated physical hypervisors, such as dedicated VMware solutions, Citrix or VDI farms. The Hypervisor management service is the technical management of a Hypervisor on physical environment. Cegeka manages both VMware and Citrix Hypervisors.
Standard Service features: The following standard features are included in this Service: Security The following activities are part of this service Security component: Cegeka ensures skilled engineers with experience on the infrastructure in or der to perform the Service. Cegeka advises in the setup of the Infrastructure in order to set it up according to the technology requirements of the Infrastructure and in line with the best practices of the vendor. This may be different for each Customer environment (DTAP - Development, Test, Acceptance, Production and it’s variants). Technical setup is documented on operational level and is available to the Customer. Cegeka is responsible for the technical operation of the Infrastructure and to assure it’s correct running during the agreed availability windows. Recurrent maintenance activities (housekeeping) are needed to ensure the correct working of the Infrastructure. Automation is applied where possible. Proactive management Housekeeping includes following regular checks: Resolution actions are triggered when needed and followed to assure the SLA. Patching The service includes a maximum of 2 patch cycles (per environment) per year for the managed Infrastructure. Patching is done in accordance to the operational Patch Plan. Life Cycle Management Cegeka monitors the Infrastructure and notifies the Customer timely when they are subject to end-of-life. This includes, if applicable, the extension or replacement of the Infrastructure. Cegeka also notifies the Customer upon newer versions of the Infrastructure in order to plan the update of the platform in time within the followed (relative) version (for example N-1). Life Cycle Updates will be planned in accordance with the agreed maintenance windows and will be executed on T&M basis. The customer will be informed at least 6 months in advance to properly plan the upgrade, as significant customer effort is required in application testing. Cegeka monitors the correct working of the Infrastructure. Monitoring improvements will be done during the lifecycle of the Service. Monitoring events are evaluated during the Service Window in accordance to the Service Level of the individual environment. Notable events are treated as Incident tickets and are handled according to regular incident management. Management of technical users The management of technical users (for engineers) is done by Cegeka in agreement with the Customer and in accordance to the Customer IAM policies. Detection of security incidents The security management is performed following the Cegeka internal security policies and the contractual Customer security policies. Security incidents are created in case a security breach is detected and is immediately communicated to the Customer and Cegeka stakeholders. SIEM Additional monitoring can be done based on System and/or Application logs, which can be forwarded to a Customer SIEM solution (Security reason) or other solution (compliance reason, e.g. central collection of application logs to oversee the application stack) on request. Underlaying Platform hardening Not applicable for this Service. The operational Backup Plan contains the information on frequency and retention of the backups in accordance to the Customer backup policy. Duration of a restore is dependant of the request (file or full; size of the item(s) to be restored. Besides monitoring incidents (see ‘Monitoring’) also other incidents can be reported by both the Customer and Cegeka. These will be subject to the regular incident management process (See Cross-functionals). Related to incident management, Cegeka performs also problem management (See Cross-functionals). n/a
Optional Service features: This section describes the features that can be optionally added to the standard Service features and that will be priced (when applicable) on top of the standard Service features. The following optional features are possible with the Service:
Requests: Both the Customer and Cegeka can issue a Request for Change (RFC) or a Request for Information (RFI). There are multiple types of requests: The handling of Requests is subject to the regular change management process (see Cross-functionals). request type Description Lead time Service Requests (no specific Service Requests for this Service) Normal Changes Any other request. Examples: Extension or modifications of the Infrastructure Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request.
Out of scope: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service description is by default out of scope of this Service.
Obligatory: The following services are mandatory for the delivery of this service:
Cegeka owned Licenses and/or subscriptio: These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Cross-Functional Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. License included in service applies to (none specific)
Customer owned Licenses and/or subscript: These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are not included in this Service. It is the customers responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. License description/remarks VMWare and/or Citrix These are ‘passthrough’ licenses, meaning that the customers orders the licences via a formal PO and are annually charged. Cegeka will only install and enable the licensed options. Administration of licenses involves: License compliancy Customer has to share the available licenses with Cegeka. Cegeka will assist in customer license compliance by providing knowledge and reporting on use of licenses and license requirements. Cegeka ensures to implement or activate features that are only in-line with the licenses owned by the customer.
Conditions: This service supports the following products:
Service delivery location: This Service is delivered remotely from the Cegeka (virtual) Office environment.
Service Reporting: Monthly reporting will be provided to inform on the availability and meeting the SLA’s and to provide insights on the capacity and expected extensions required. Specific reports are provided:
Data classification: Cegeka requires no access to confidential and/or personal data to perform this Service. Engineer credentials do not need to access such data for the purpose of this Service. In case of assistance in investigations of functional issues, Cegeka personnel may see or receive fragments of such data in case it is shared by the Customer (data fragments in the sense of exports, screen sharing, screen shots, etc. for investigation purposes).
Use of Subcontractor/Sub-outsourcer: This service is delivered with: Subcontractor (Cegeka manages the Service with own engineers which are supported by an external party for escalations or technology specific questions or issues): VMware (Broadcom) Sub-outsourcer (Cegeka delegates the Service to an external party): (none)
